questions.question: How do I onboard as a new employee at Nexus HR?
questions.expected: New employees activate their account via a welcome email, complete their profile, enroll in benefits within 30 days, request equipment through IT, and complete mandatory training modules within the first two weeks.

questions.question: How many days of annual leave do I get?
questions.expected: Full-time employees accrue 20 days of annual leave per year, earned at 1.67 days per month.

questions.question: When do I get paid?
questions.expected: Nexus HR pays on a bi-weekly schedule. Salaries are deposited every second Friday. If a pay date falls on a public holiday, payment is made on the preceding Thursday.

questions.question: How do I reset my Nexus HR portal password?
questions.expected: Click Forgot Password on the login page and follow the instructions sent to your registered email. If you have lost access to your email, contact IT support or call 1-800-NEXUSHR.

questions.question: What is the maximum hotel limit when travelling for work?
questions.expected: Accommodation is reimbursed up to $200 per night. Any hotel above this limit requires director approval.

questions.question: How do I apply for parental leave?
questions.expected: Primary caregivers are entitled to 16 weeks of fully paid parental leave and secondary caregivers to 4 weeks. Notify HR at least 8 weeks in advance where possible.

questions.question: What happens to my system access when I resign?
questions.expected: All system access is revoked at 5pm on the last day of employment. Company email is deactivated 24 hours after the last day with a forwarding message set up for 30 days.

questions.question: How much does Nexus HR contribute to my 401k?
questions.expected: Nexus HR matches 100% of employee contributions up to 4% of salary. Employees are eligible to enroll after 90 days of employment.

questions.question: What is the stock price of Nexus HR?
Create a support ticket for a payroll error on my last paycheck
questions.expected: A support ticket has been created for the payroll error.

questions.question: Create a ticket for a laptop that is not turning on
questions.expected: A support ticket has been created for the laptop hardware issue.

questions.question: What is the referral bonus if I refer someone who gets hired?
questions.expected: Employees receive a $1500 referral bonus if their referred candidate is hired and completes 90 days of employment. The bonus is paid in the next payroll cycle.
